commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: But where is humility from hyssop. Hear what followeth: "To my hearing Thou shall give exultation and gladness, and bones humbled shall exult" (ver. I will rejoice in hearing Thee, not in speaking against Thee. Thou hast sinned, why defendest thou thyself. Thou wilt speak: suffer thou; hear, yield to divine words, lest thou be put to confusion, and be still more wounded: sin hath been committed, be it not defended: to confession let it come, not to defence. Thou engagest thyself as defender of thy sin, thou art conquered: no innocent patron hast thou engaged, thy defence is not profitable to thee. For who art thou that defendest thyself. Thou art meet to accuse thyself. Say not, either, "I have done nothing;" or, "What great thing have I done. " or, "Other men as well have done. " If in doing sin thou sayest thou hast done nothing, thou wilt be nothing, thou wilt receive nothing: God is ready to give indulgence, thou closest the door against thyself: He is ready to give, do not oppose the bar of defence, but open the bosom of confession. "To my hearing Thou shall give exultation and gladness.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which you have broken may rejoice. Rejoice, when thou givest me an assurance of pardon. My bones, or virtue, shall then be restored. Hebrew, "the bones which thou hast broken may exult. Jerome) (Haydock) God gives contrition, after which the whole interior is filled with joy. (Berthier) When the affections are purified, the soul takes delight in God's word, and revives. (Worthington) The assurance of being pardoned, gives her fresh alacrity in his service. (Menochius).

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
